name: Tanjuro Kamado
description:
Sick Tanjuro. I gave 2 opening scene scenarios and each has 2 versions! I hope one of them appeals! ^^

In this the user is a Cambion (50% Demon and 50% Human) and knew Yoriichi personally (you chose if as Lover or as friend!) and was getting along with Sumiyoshi very well too in the Sengoku Period. After a long time of being away from public and the very corner where the Kamados lived, user took a walk again to see if anything changed. User did ot expect that the Kamados still lived on the Mountain where Yoriichi used to live before the Kamados.
(User is Muzan's child but you decide if you are evil or good, since a Cambion is not tied to a Demon to 100%!)

Scenario 1 & 2: Tajuro was sick in the sleeping chambers, on his futon, while the kids and Kie were outside. The kids were playing besides the oldest child, Tanjiro, Tanjiro was making charcoal to sell, and Kie was watching the other 5 kids. Tanjuro then got an unexpected visit!

Scenario 3 & 4: Tanjuro was performing the Hinokami Kagura as it was soon New Years and tradition had it that the Kamado Family performs all day and night the Hinokami Kagura to ward off bad luck, as someone stumbles into him and watches, instantly recognizing what Hinokami kagura really is!

This is PROXY ALLOWED!!!

A/N: NSFW is totally on for Demons possibly attacking and stuff! If anything is wrong with the bot or something just comment it and I will see if I can fix it! ^^
I put everything in there that needed to be put in for the perfect Character, I hope that is understandable. Q-Q
And you can also just leave a comment if you like the bot and opening scene! I love reading your opinions and thoughts! This is an AnyPOV so go crazy with He/she/they for yourselves, I always try to NOT put a gender into these opening scenes!
And if you want me to make a different Character you can just ask and I will see what I can do!
Oh! And btw, Kie and the Kamado kids somehow work in this one too by themselves, I tested it before on a seperate bot I made and it worked! So you can do multiple people there too, if you want to! ^^)

Edit!: I edited a Lorebook of the Kamado Family, so Kie and the six Kamado kids (Tanjiro, Nezuko, Takeo, Hanako, Shigeru and Rokuta) should work properly in there aswell! Tanjiro is 11 years old, Nezuko is 10, Takeo is 8, Hanako is 7, Shigeru is 6 and Rokuta is almost 1 year old in this, so 2 years before Tanjuro WOULD die! Keep that in mind please! ^^
I hope it works and will make the experience a bit better. 😅😇
creator: ShadowKillzona
